title: Numeric invariants
description: Shared numeric `$defs` reused by every command schema, the dispatcher validation pipeline, and state-shape minima. The constants encode the rules pinned in docs/architecture/edge-cases-policy.md § 5 (zero-resource transactions) and § 6 (overflow & saturation), and the saturation table in docs/architecture/determinism.md § Saturation policy.

positiveInteger.description: Quantity / amount fields where zero is meaningless (RECRUIT_UNITS quantity, SPLIT_ARMY_STACK quantity, TRADE_RESOURCES amount, ...). Encoding zero in the command payload is rejected at schema time.

nonNegativeInteger.description: Cost / delta fields where zero is a legal but explicit value (a Mysticism-discounted spell cost; an empty resource bundle entry). State-shape resource and unit-count fields also reuse this floor.

resourceAmount.description: Player-side resource scalar. Maximum equals MAX_RESOURCE (2_000_000_000). Saturation policy: clamp at the cap; never wrap. See docs/architecture/determinism.md § Saturation policy.

unitCount.description: Stack-count scalar. Maximum equals MAX_UNIT_COUNT (1_000_000). Same clamp-not-wrap policy as resourceAmount.

intermediate.description: Formula-step intermediate. Maximum equals MAX_INTERMEDIATE (2^53 - 1). Dev builds raise OverflowError when an intermediate exceeds the bound; prod builds saturate.
